nasb.text: and Eber lived four hundred and thirty years after he became the father of Peleg, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Eber lived after he fathered Peleg 430 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 希伯生法勒以後，又活了四百三十年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了四百三十年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 希伯生了法勒之后，又活了四百三十年，并且生了其他的儿女。
